S.FORM: = Filipe Nyusi = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 9 ka Filipe Nyusi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Mozambique ta sayang o kiya ka Filipe Nyusi, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ilipə njusi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka *ilipə njusi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan mo*ambiquə ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ilipə njusi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Filipe Nyusi = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 9 ka Filipe Nyusi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Mozambique ta sayang o kiya ka Filipe Nyusi, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 1 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = *ilipə njusi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka *ilipə njusi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan mo*ambiquə ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ilipə njusi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
